data.body:
## Description
Write test_stale_red_marker_regression in tests/hooks/test-record-test-status.sh that replays three scenarios with distinct git repo fixtures:
1. Exit 0 + RED marker → stale detection fires
2. Exit non-zero + passing RED-zone test → stale detection fires
3. Exit non-zero + all RED-zone tests fail → tolerance preserved (no regression)

## TDD Exemption
Integration test covering existing code paths already verified by Tasks 1-4 (exemption criterion 1: existing coverage — an existing integration test already exercises this boundary in a way that would fail if the task's behavior were broken).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Regression test passes with all 3 scenarios
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-record-test-status.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_stale_red_marker_regression.*PASS'
